channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: 2 US service members missing after military exercises in Morocco
item.description: Two U.S. service members are missing in southwestern Morocco after taking part in annual multinational military exercises in the North African country, the United States Africa Command (AFRICOM) said.
item.content:encoded:
Two U.S. service members are missing in southwestern Morocco after taking part in annual multinational military exercises in the North African country, the United States Africa Command (AFRICOM) said.

(Image credit: Mosa'ab Elshamy)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Gas prices went up more than 30 cents a gallon last week. How high could they go?
item.description: U.S. gas prices were nearly $3 an average prior to the start of the war in Iran.
item.content:encoded:
U.S. gas prices were nearly $3 an average prior to the start of the war in Iran.

(Image credit: Jenny Kane)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: A journalist revisits a decision to report on a teacher for sexual abuse
item.description: Investigative journalist Isolde Raftery of KUOW explains why, two decades later, she re-investigated her own reporting on a teacher accused of sexual abuse.
item.content:encoded: Investigative journalist Isolde Raftery of KUOW explains why, two decades later, she re-investigated her own reporting on a teacher accused of sexual abuse.
item.dc:creator: Mallory Yu

item.title: Pellet found in Secret Service agent's vest links suspect to WHCD attack, Pirro says
item.description: The pellet "definitively" links the suspect, Cole Tomas Allen, to the attack, U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro told CNN on Sunday.
item.content:encoded:
The pellet "definitively" links the suspect, Cole Tomas Allen, to the attack, U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro told CNN on Sunday.

(Image credit: Annabelle Gordon)
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein

item.title: Politics chat: Trump on Iran's proposal to end war, SCOTUS weakens Voting Rights Act
item.description: President Trump says he's reviewing a new Iranian proposal to end the war, and the U.S. Supreme Court weakens the Voting Rights Act of 1965.
item.content:encoded: President Trump says he's reviewing a new Iranian proposal to end the war, and the U.S. Supreme Court weakens the Voting Rights Act of 1965.
item.dc:creator: Hadeel Al-Shalchi

item.title: How algorithms wreaked havoc with these workers' schedules and cut their pay
item.description: Hourly workers across a number of industries have long been grappling with unstable schedules and pay as their employers use software to slash labor costs and maximize productivity.
item.content:encoded:
Hourly workers across a number of industries have long been grappling with unstable schedules and pay as their employers use software to slash labor costs and maximize productivity.

(Image credit: Huo Jingnan)
item.dc:creator: Huo Jingnan

item.title: Bard College's president to retire after scrutiny of relationship with Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: The longtime president of Bard College in New York has announced his retirement, months after it was revealed that he had a much deeper relationship than was previously known with Jeffrey Epstein.
item.content:encoded:
The longtime president of Bard College in New York has announced his retirement, months after it was revealed that he had a much deeper relationship than was previously known with Jeffrey Epstein.

(Image credit: Philip Kamrass)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Golden Tempo takes the Kentucky Derby as Cherie DeVaux becomes the 1st woman to train its winner
item.description: Golden Tempo has won the Kentucky Derby at odds of 23-1 to make Cherie DeVaux the first woman to train the winner of the opening leg of the Triple Crown.
item.content:encoded:
Golden Tempo has won the Kentucky Derby at odds of 23-1 to make Cherie DeVaux the first woman to train the winner of the opening leg of the Triple Crown.

(Image credit: Jeff Roberson)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Comedian Sheng Wang on finding joy in the mundane
item.description: In his new Netflix special, comedian Sheng Wang elevates mundane moments - like picking a toothbrush - into punchlines. NPR's Emily Feng talks to the comedian about where he finds joy.
item.content:encoded: In his new Netflix special, comedian Sheng Wang elevates mundane moments - like picking a toothbrush - into punchlines. NPR's Emily Feng talks to the comedian about where he finds joy.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Ofman

item.title: Academy announces major overhaul to rules
item.description: The new rules focus on areas such as AI protections for writers and actors and expanded eligibility for international films.
item.content:encoded:
The new rules focus on areas such as AI protections for writers and actors and expanded eligibility for international films.

(Image credit: Frederic J. Brown)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman
